name: Seafood Au Gratin with Artichoke Hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the butter and add flour. Stir constantly for 1 minute over low heat.
2. Gradually add milk and stir until the mixture thickens.
3. Add cream cheese gradually, stirring with a whisk.
4. Incorporate remaining ingredients.
5. Cook no more than 10 minutes over low heat, stirring constantly.
6. Serve over rice or toast points. Serves 6 to 8.
